---
title: "Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center"
subtitle: "Resources for Operations and Computing"
date: today
toc: true
# execute:
#   freeze: auto
---

<!-- TODO: Image of recent findings -->
![Siemens 3T Cima.X arrives at Notre Dame!](media/veldman_mri.jpg){fig-align="left"}


## About

Welcome to the Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center (ND-HNC) -- Resources for Operations and Computing page!

Our aim is to provide resources and support for every step of your research program, from grant application to publication, and the many technical details in between:

- [Facilities](pages/facilities.qmd): Understand available resources
- [Training](pages/training.qmd): Get access by scheduling and maintaining your training
- [Schedule](pages/schedule.qmd): Book facilities and billing
- Data collection
  <!-- - Mock
  - Stimulus computer
  - DICOM computer -->
- Compute:
  <!-- - Local machines
  - Local rack
  - Cluster resources -->
- Storage
- Publications

## Additional Materials

- [SOPs](pages/sops.qmd): Standard Operating Policies
- [Policies](pages/policies.qmd): Center policies
- [Forms](pages/forms.qmd): Participant screener, operational forms
- [Wiki](pages/wiki.qmd): Programming, data, and pipeline help
